title: A Last Look at the Sky Island
description: The crew enjoys the peaceful aftermath of Enel’s defeat while Skypiea begins turning war into celebration.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this scene focuses on Luffy, Nico Robin, Nami, Usopp, Zoro. The crew enjoys the peaceful aftermath of Enel’s defeat while Skypiea begins turning war into celebration.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: for us to fight any longer...?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: That means I too must lead,

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: All the poneglyph passages I have read...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Miss... About that straw hat boy...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: His name is Monkey D. Luffy.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: As if you can all talk!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oh, NOW they all suddenly come back.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oh crap! They've got a huge cannon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Aghhh! There's so many of them!

summary: The crew enjoys the peaceful aftermath of Enel’s defeat while Skypiea begins turning war into celebration.
